name: Cnlight Co.,Ltd
summary: Cnlight Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells lighting products in China. It offers LED lighting products comprising LED bulbs, spotlights, ceiling lights, panel lights, tube lights, down lights, strip lights, and candle bulbs, as well as recessed LED ceiling lights; and energy saving lamps consisting of high power, single capped, and double capped fluorescent lamps, as well as electric ballasts and light fixtures. The company also provides ceramic metal halide lamps; home lamps, such as cartoon table, eye protection table, LED desk, office table, floor, and dimmable lamps; automotive lighting products, including HID lamps, ballasts, and kits; and environmental purification products comprising building air purifiers, indoor mini air purifiers, and electronic deodorants, as well as UV lamps and sterilization equipment, and ballasts. Its products are used in various applications, such as solid-state, indoor, outdoor, motor vehicle, and special lighting, as well as for environmental purification applications. Cnlight Co.,Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Foshan, China.
